user.title: Set up EV Charge Limiter
user.description: Select the OCPP energy sensor, optional live power sensor, and the entity used to stop charging. The power sensor is optional but recommended for dynamic early stop and remaining-time estimates.

data.name: Name
data.stop_service: Stop service, use auto unless needed
data.create_notification: Create notification when charging is stopped

error.same_entity: Energy sensor and stop entity cannot be the same.
error.same_power_energy: Power sensor cannot be the same as the energy sensor.
error.same_power_stop: Power sensor cannot be the same as the stop entity.
error.same_current_other: Current entity cannot be the same as another selected entity.

abort.already_configured: This EV Charge Limiter is already configured.

init.title: EV Charge Limiter options
init.description: Update sensors, energy mode, and stop settings.
